full_text:
Wei Kai иЎӣеҮұ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wei Kai (иЎӣеҮұ). Rebelled with Hou Yin but Cao Ren defeated and executed them. Wei Kai was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Wei Kai lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
